items.title: Single-Stage Voltage Gain Heuristic
items.summary: Prefer common-source style stages for moderate gain targets with simple, inspectable device stacks.

notes: Use explicit resistive load when interpretability matters.
Move to active load if resistor area or gain pressure grows.

items.title: General-Purpose Op-Amp Heuristic
items.summary: Use two-stage Miller for broad compatibility and folded cascode when headroom or low-noise hints dominate.

notes: Folded cascode is often safer below about 1.2 V supply.
Miller compensation is the easiest first-pass compensation strategy.

items.title: Current Mirror Family Heuristic
items.summary: Escalate from simple mirror to higher-order variants only when output resistance, headroom, copy accuracy, or very low current behavior are explicit needs.
